content.rendered:
• 2024.01.15, Ms. Jiahui Qian from Fudan Univ. joined our group for the EIT-SJTU PhD program in the fall of 2024! Welcome aboard!
  • 2024.01.13, Dr. Richang Huang from Hong Kong Univ. joined our group for a postdoc internship! Welcome aboard!
  • 2023.12.13, Dr. Jiayong Zhang and Dr. Xianzhang Chen passed their Postdoctoral thesis proposal defense! Congrats!
  • 2023.11, Prof. Tong Zhou delivered an invited talk about Probing Non-Abelian Statistics of Majorana Zero Modes at Quantum Salon, Institute for Quantum Science and Engineering, Shenzhen, China
  • 2023.10, Prof. Tong Zhou delivered an invited talk at the Conference of Quantum transport theroy, Nanjing Univ., China
  • 2023.09.26, Dr. Xianzhang Chen from Lanzhou Univ. joined our group as a postdoc! Welcome aboard!
  • 2023.09, Prof. Tong Zhou delivered an invited talk about Topological superconductivity in Planar Josephson Junctions at the International Forum on Micro-Nano Technology & Composites Innovation Development, Zhengzhou, China
  • 2023.09.07, Dr. Jiayong Zhang from Fudan Univ. joined our group as a postdoc! Welcome aboard!
  • 2023.07, Prof. Tong Zhou delivered an invited talk about Non-Abelian statistics at the Conference of Condensed Matter Physics 2023, Liyang, China
  • 2023.07.13, A big welcome to Mr. Xunkai Duan from Jiangsu Normal University, Mr. Yongliang Hu from Tongji University, and Mr. Kang Yang from Jiangsu Normal University, who have joined our group as Research Assistant and for the EIT-SJTU and EIT-PolyU PhD programs, respectively, in fall 2023.
  • 2023.06.30, Prof. Tong Zhou established his research group at EIT! Congrats!
